center.name: Henry Luke White
center.summary: Henry Luke White是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Naretha bluebonnet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Naretha bluebonnet (Northiella narethae) or Naretha parrot is a bird found in a remote and arid region of Australia

links.evidence: The Naretha bluebonnet (Northiella narethae) or Naretha parrot is a bird found in a remote and arid region of Australia
